falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,500 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this level would indicate a bullish trend, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield rises above 4.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp increase in yields would signal heightened inflation expectations or aggressive Fed tightening, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict by introducing a clear bearish driver.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Volatility Index drops below 15 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a decline would indicate extreme market complacency, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a pre-blowoff setup but a false bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
